name: TEMPO
motive: Temporal Dilation / Time Manipulation: A controlled localized environment where time flows differently from the outside world, enabling accelerated future travel through engineered relativistic temporal conditions.
priority_reason: Explores localized time speedups and relativistic spacetime physics.
next_build: Model mathematical spacetime geodesics, run relativistic gravity potential simulators, and measure centrifuge optical lattice clocks.
integration_role: Kattappa AI OS runs relativity models and collects precision clock calibration logs.
safety_boundary: Theoretical and modeling research only; energy density limits must prevent micro-gravity hazards.
